emails.subject: Re: 6/4/99 and 6/9/99 (98-0439) Enerfin TETCO
emails.body: Sorry about this, Victor. I didn't even pay attention to the date. I was thinking this was October business. We will definitely be able to do somthing with this on our side and not involve the East Desk. D Enron North America Corp. From: Victor Lamadrid 11/01/2000 06:34 PM
